item.title: Collecting Tiny Finds on the Thames
item.description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore, collecting tiny mudlarking finds and uncovering the stories they may hold. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore, collecting tiny mudlarking finds and uncovering the stories they may hold. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: An Ordinary Toothbrush, a Hidden Story
item.description: Nicola White explores a Thames foreshore find and traces the history behind an everyday toothbrush. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River

item.title: Saving a Special Object at Low Tide
item.description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore to save a special object before the tide returns. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: A Long Pipe Stem on the Thames Foreshore
item.description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore and uncovers a long pipe stem, a small find that offers a glimpse into everyday history. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: A Tiny Coin Found Mudlarking
item.description: Nicola White finds a tiny coin while mudlarking the Thames foreshore, where small objects can reveal everyday history. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

item.title: A Rare Thames Find on the Foreshore
item.description: Nicola White spots a rare find on the Thames foreshore and explores its story through mudlarking and research. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames
